name: Cheyenne Tysdale

sheet.name: Cheyenne Tysdale
sheet.background_story:
Lady Cheyenne Tysdale is the daughter of Lord Liam and Lady Eva Tysdale of House Tysdale.

As the youngest member of her family, Cheyenne has inherited the scholarly traits of her parents and shares their passion for knowledge and discovery.

She is fiercely protected by her brothers Roy and Theo.

Cheyenne has risen to prominence within the family, and is destined to make a significant impact on the Dawnlands in the years to come.

description:
